name: Tarragon-Vanilla Salad Dressing
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Nonfat or low-fat plain yogurt
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine all ingredients.
2. Whisk until smooth.
3. Adjust the seasoning with additional salt and/or lemon juice as desired.
4. Refrigerate until ready to use. The flavor improves over time.
5. This dressing will keep for up to one week.
Yield: Approximately 2 1/2 cups.
